info.name: North Wollo Tourism — Full Test Suite
info.description: 100% coverage of all API endpoints mapped to chapter 6 test cases (FT-*, TC-*, SEC-*). Run with Collection Runner in order.

exec: pm.test('Has accessToken', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b).to.have.property('accessToken'); pm.collectionVariables.set('clientToken', b.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', b.refreshToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('userId', b.userId); });

pm.test('Tokens returned', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.accessToken).to.exist; pm.collectionVariables.set('clientToken', b.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', b.refreshToken); });
pm.test('New accessToken', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.accessToken).to.exist; pm.collectionVariables.set('clientToken', b.accessToken); });

item.name: FT-AUTH-03 Access protected route without token → 401
TC-AUTH-14 Password reset unknown email → generic 200 (no enumeration)
Login ADMIN (setup — run after seeding admin user)

exec: const b = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('adminToken', b.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('adminUserId', b.userId);
const b = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('clientToken', b.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', b.refreshToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('userId', b.userId);

item.name: FT-AUTH-04 CLIENT token on ADMIN route → 403

exec: pm.test('Has id', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.id).to.exist; pm.collectionVariables.set('tourismId', b.id); });
pm.test('Returns array or paginated result', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b).to.exist; });

item.name: TC-TRM-09 Add image to tourism place

exec: pm.test('Has id', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('imageId', b.id); });
pm.test('Has id', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.id).to.exist; pm.collectionVariables.set('hotelId', b.id); });

item.name: TC-HTL-11 Get hotels by tourism place
FT-ADM-03 Grant HOTEL_OWNER role to user
TC-HTL-03 Get hotels by owner (re-login as owner first)

exec: pm.test('Status is REQUESTED', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.bookingStatus).to.equal('REQUESTED'); pm.collectionVariables.set('bookingId', b.bookingId || b.id); });

item.name: TC-BKG-09 Invalid state transition — accept already REQUESTED (should work) then accept again → 400
Create second booking for reject test

exec: const b = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('bookingId2', b.bookingId || b.id);

item.name: TC-BKG-14 Upload receipt invalid file type → 400
FT-RT-08 Upsert — submit second rating same place
FT-RD-03 List roads with tourism place filter
FT-HS-04 Get horse services by road

body.raw: {"name":"Lalibela Church Entrance","type":"TOURISM_PLACE","latitude":12.0316,"longitude":39.0472,"description":"Main entrance to the rock churches","tourismPlaceId":{{tourismId}}}

item.name: FT-MAP-04 Get map points by tourism place
FT-MAP-08 Calculate distance between two points
